## Description

Deploy nanobot in Docker, add a WebSocket channel for real-time chat, and build a Flutter web UI.

## Deliverables

- [ ] Nanobot Dockerized and running in docker-compose
- [ ] WebSocket channel enabled
- [ ] Flutter web chat UI at `/flutter`
- [ ] Access protected by `NANOBOT_ACCESS_KEY`

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Can access Flutter chat UI in browser
- [ ] Can send messages and receive agent responses
- [ ] Agent can list its capabilities in the chat
